name: ambiguous_attribution
description: Acceptance fixture #10. The source window contains TWO known vendor names (subject vendor + a competitor) but no matching antecedent pattern, so the validator cannot prove which entity owns the negative trait. Per the plan: 'If those gates pass but the validator detects ambiguous attribution (multiple vendor names within the source window with no clear antecedent marker AND no matching transition pattern), return cannot_validate with rejection_reason=ambiguous_attribution. Do NOT return valid in ambiguous cases.'

review.review_text: We compared Monday.com and HubSpot for our team scheduling and pipeline tracking. Pricing keeps creeping up at every renewal and we are revisiting the decision next quarter.

witness.excerpt_text: Pricing keeps creeping up at every renewal
